sentences.target: Ich nehme heute das Menü mit Suppe.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə ˈhɔʏ̯tə das meˈnyː mɪt ˈzʊpə/

translations.de: Ich nehme heute das Menü mit Suppe.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə ˈhɔʏ̯tə das meˈnyː mɪt ˈzʊpə/
translations.en: I’ll take the set menu with soup today.
translations.es: Hoy voy a pedir el menú con sopa.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, je prends le menu avec la soupe.
translations.it: Oggi prendo il menù con la zuppa.
translations.ko: 오늘은 수프가 있는 세트 메뉴로 할게요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我要点有汤的套餐。
translations.ru: Сегодня возьму комплексный обед с супом.
translations.pt: Hoje vou pedir o menu com sopa.
translations.he: היום אני מזמין את הארוחה שכוללת מרק.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi gọi suất có súp.
translations.nl: Vandaag neem ik het menu met soep.
translations.uk: Сьогодні візьму комплексний обід із супом.
translations.hi: आज मैं सूप वाला सेट मेनू लूँगा.
translations.el: Σήμερα θα πάρω το μενού με τη σούπα.
translations.nb: I dag tar jeg menyen med suppe.
translations.id: Hari ini saya pesan paket dengan sup.
translations.sv: Idag tar jag menyn med soppa.
translations.cs: Dnes si dám menu s polévkou.
translations.da: I dag tager jeg menuen med suppe.
translations.fi: Tänään otan menun, jossa on keitto.
translations.ja: 今日はスープ付きのセットにします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Main verb; present indicative, 1st person singular; selects an accusative object and a PP complement.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause.
Definite article; neuter accusative singular; determiner for 'Menü'.
Noun; neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'nehme'.
Preposition governing dative; heads the PP 'mit Suppe' (content/accompaniment).
Noun; feminine singular dative; object of the preposition 'mit'.

sentences.target: Du öffnest bitte das Menü jetzt.

translations.de: Du öffnest bitte das Menü jetzt.
translations.es: Por favor, abre el menú ahora.
translations.fr: Ouvre le menu maintenant, s’il te plaît.
translations.it: Per favore, apri il menù adesso.
translations.pt: Por favor, abre o menu agora.
translations.vi: Làm ơn mở menu ngay bây giờ.
translations.hu: Kérlek, nyisd meg most a menüt.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, åpne menyen nå.
translations.ja: 今、メニューを開いてください。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb; present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive, taking 'das Menü' as object.
Politeness adverb/discourse particle; clause-level modifier softening the request.
Definite article; neuter accusative singular; determiner for 'Menü'.
Noun; neuter singular accusative; direct object of 'öffnest'.
Temporal adverb; situates the action in the present moment.

sentences.target: Auf dem Tablet ist das Menü zu klein.
sentences.reading: /aʊ̯f deːm ˈtablɛt ɪst das meˈnyː tsuː klaɪ̯n/

translations.de: Auf dem Tablet ist das Menü zu klein.
translations.ipa: /aʊ̯f deːm ˈtablɛt ɪst das meˈnyː tsuː klaɪ̯n/
translations.en: On the tablet, the menu is too small.
translations.es: En la tablet, el menú es demasiado pequeño.
translations.fr: Sur la tablette, le menu est trop petit.
translations.it: Sul tablet il menù è troppo piccolo.
translations.pt: No tablet, o menu está muito pequeno.
translations.vi: Trên máy tính bảng, menu quá nhỏ.
translations.ar: على الجهاز اللوحي، القائمة صغيرة جداً.
translations.nl: Op de tablet is het menu te klein.
translations.hu: A tableten a menü túl kicsi.
translations.hi: टैबलेट पर मेनू बहुत छोटा है.
translations.pl: Na tablecie menu jest za małe.
translations.el: Στο τάμπλετ το μενού είναι πολύ μικρό.
translations.nb: På nettbrettet er menyen for liten.
translations.sv: På surfplattan är menyn för liten.
translations.ro: Pe tabletă, meniul e prea mic.
translations.cs: Na tabletu je menu příliš malé.
translations.da: På tabletten er menuen for lille.
translations.ja: タブレットではメニューが小さすぎます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; with static location takes dative; heads the PP 'Auf dem Tablet'.
Definite article; neuter dative singular; determiner for 'Tablet' within the PP.
Noun; neuter singular dative; object of the preposition 'auf'.
Copula; finite present, 3rd person singular; links subject 'das Menü' to the predicate adjective.
Definite article; neuter nominative singular; determiner for the subject 'Menü'.
Noun; neuter singular nominative; grammatical subject of the copular clause.
Degree adverb meaning 'too'; modifies the predicate adjective 'klein'.
Adjective in predicative position; complement of the copula 'ist'.

sentences.target: Das Menü kostet heute nur zwölf Euro.
sentences.reading: /das meˈnyː ˈkɔstət ˈhɔʏ̯tə nuːɐ̯ tsvœlf ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/

translations.de: Das Menü kostet heute nur zwölf Euro.
translations.ipa: /das meˈnyː ˈkɔstət ˈhɔʏ̯tə nuːɐ̯ tsvœlf ˈɔʏ̯ʁo/
translations.en: The menu costs only twelve euros today.
translations.es: Hoy el menú cuesta solo doce euros.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, le menu coûte seulement douze euros.
translations.it: Oggi il menù costa solo dodici euro.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这份套餐只要12欧元。
translations.ru: Сегодня комплексный обед стоит всего двенадцать евро.
translations.pt: Hoje o menu custa apenas doze euros.
translations.tr: Bugün menü sadece on iki avro tutuyor.
translations.nl: Vandaag kost het menu maar twaalf euro.
translations.uk: Сьогодні комплексний обід коштує всього дванадцять євро.
translations.hu: Ma a menü csak tizenkét euróba kerül.
translations.hi: आज मेनू की कीमत सिर्फ बारह यूरो है.
translations.pl: Dziś zestaw kosztuje tylko dwanaście euro.
translations.el: Σήμερα το μενού κοστίζει μόνο δώδεκα ευρώ.
translations.nb: I dag koster menyen bare tolv euro.
translations.sv: Idag kostar menyn bara tolv euro.
translations.ro: Astăzi meniul costă doar doisprezece euro.
translations.cs: Dnes menu stojí jen dvanáct eur.
translations.da: I dag koster menuen kun tolv euro.
translations.fi: Tänään menu maksaa vain kaksitoista euroa.
translations.ja: 今日はセットが12ユーロだけです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter nominative singular; determiner for the subject 'Menü'.
Noun; neuter singular nominative; subject of 'kostet'.
Main verb; present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a measure phrase as object.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause with time reference.
Focus adverb; limits the amount expressed by the following numeric phrase.
Cardinal numeral; numeric modifier (nummod) of 'Euro'; accusative as part of the measure object.
Currency noun; accusative plural in a measure phrase; direct object of 'kostet'.
